basic_details.job_title: CCRAS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 33 Stenographer, Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Central Council for Research in Ayurvedic Sciences (CCRAS)
basic_details.short_information: Central Council for Research in Ayurvedic Sciences (CCRAS) Stenographer, Accountant and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.ccras.nic.in. A total of 33 vacancies have been announced through the CCRAS Stenographer, Accountant and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per the government norms for deputation.

qualification.education_qualification: Eligibility conditions as per deputation rules specified for each post
qualification.details: Private Secretary: Holding analogous post on regular basis in the parent cadre or Department OR With five years regular service in pay level-6 as Stenographer Grade-I. Stenographer Grade-I: Holding analogous post on regular basis in the parent cadre or Department OR With 10 years regular service in pay level-4 as Stenographer Grade-II. Accountant: Officers working under the Central Govt./Central Autonomous Bodies/State Govt./PSUs, holding analogous post on regular basis and having experience of Cash, Accounts and Budget work OR With three years regular service in a post in Pay Level-6 having experience in Cash, Accounts and Budget work OR Working in any of the Organized Accounts Department as Accountant/Jr. Accountant in Pay Level-6 with three years regular service. Upper Division Clerk: Officers of the Central Govt. holding analogous post on regular basis OR Should have Eight years of regular service as Lower Division Clerk in pay level 2 or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Private Secretary: Pay Level-7 Stenographer Grade-I: Pay Level-6 Accountant: Pay Level-7 Upper Division Clerk: Pay Level-4

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CCRAS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ccras.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.central_council_for_research_in_ayurvedi: Eligibility conditions as per deputation rules specified for each post

content_sections.heading: CCRAS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CCRAS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CCRAS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CCRAS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Private Secretary: Holding analogous post on regular basis in the parent cadre or Department OR With five years regular service in pay level-6 as Stenographer Grade-I. Stenographer Grade-I: Holding analogous post on regular basis in the parent cadre or Department OR With 10 years regular service in pay level-4 as Stenographer Grade-II. Accountant: Officers working under the Central Govt./Central Autonomous Bodies/State Govt./PSUs, holding analogous post on regular basis and having experience of Cash, Accounts and Budget work OR With three years regular service in a post in Pay Level-6 having experience in Cash, Accounts and Budget work OR Working in any of the Organized Accounts Department as Accountant/Jr. Accountant in Pay Level-6 with three years regular service. Upper Division Clerk: Officers of the Central Govt. holding analogous post on regular basis OR Should have Eight years of regular service as Lower Division Clerk in pay level 2 or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: CCRAS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per the government norms for deputation.

content_sections.heading: CCRAS Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Private Secretary: Pay Level-7 Stenographer Grade-I: Pay Level-6 Accountant: Pay Level-7 Upper Division Clerk: Pay Level-4

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CCRAS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.ccras.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CCRAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for CCRAS Recruitment 2026 is 13 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CCRAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 33 vacancies announced for various posts including Private Secretary, Stenographer Grade-I, Accountant, and Upper Division Clerk in the CCRAS Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for CCRAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application for CCRAS Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to CCRAS posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under CCRAS Recruitment 2026 is 56 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the posts in CCRAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts ranges from Level-4 to Level-7 as per the 7th Pay Commission, depending on the specific post applied for.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CCRAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for CCRAS Recruitment 2026 is based on deputation. Candidates will be selected based on their eligibility and experience for deputation.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CCRAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CCRAS Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form for CCRAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form for CCRAS Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of CCRAS, which is www.ccras.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What are the eligibility criteria for the Upper Division Clerk post?
faq.answer: For the Upper Division Clerk post, candidates should be officers of the Central Government holding an analogous post on a regular basis or should have eight years of regular service as Lower Division Clerk in pay level 2 or equivalent.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of CCRAS?
faq.answer: The official website of the Central Council for Research in Ayurvedic Sciences (CCRAS) is www.ccras.nic.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.
